title: Visualizing the Schröder-Bernstein Theorem
description: This diagram illustrates the core idea of the Schröder-Bernstein theorem: if there exist injective functions between two sets A and B in both directions, then there exists a bijective function between them, establishing that |A| = |B|.
relationships: f maps elements from A into B injectively
g maps elements from B into A injectively
The theorem uses these two injections to construct a partition of A and B, and then defines a bijection h that uses f on one part and the inverse of g on the other.
